glosses.ja: 照らす; 明るくする

sentences.target: J'illumine le salon avec des bougies.

translations.fr: J'illumine le salon avec des bougies.
translations.en: I light up the living room with candles.
translations.de: Ich erhelle das Wohnzimmer mit Kerzen.
translations.it: Illumino il soggiorno con le candele.
translations.he: אני מאיר את הסלון עם נרות.
translations.vi: Tôi thắp nến làm sáng phòng khách.
translations.nl: Ik verlicht de woonkamer met kaarsen.
translations.hi: मैं मोमबत्तियों से बैठक कक्ष को रोशन करता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg lyser opp stuen med stearinlys.
translations.id: Saya menerangi ruang tamu dengan lilin.
translations.sv: Jag lyser upp vardagsrummet med stearinljus.
translations.da: Jeg lyser stuen op med stearinlys.
translations.ja: 私はろうそくで居間を照らす。

tokens.explanation: Finite lexical verb (present indicative, 1st person singular) with elided subject clitic 'je' (j'); transitive, selecting the direct object 'le salon'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determinizes the noun 'salon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb 'J'illumine'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental complement.
Indefinite plural article; determinizes 'bougies' as an unspecified quantity.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'avec' indicating the instrument used.

sentences.target: Tu illumines la table pour le dîner.
sentences.reading: /ty il.y.min la tabl puʁ lə dine/

translations.fr: Tu illumines la table pour le dîner.
translations.ipa: /ty il.y.min la tabl puʁ lə dine/
translations.en: You light up the table for dinner.
translations.es: Iluminas la mesa para la cena.
translations.de: Du beleuchtest den Tisch für das Abendessen.
translations.it: Illumini la tavola per la cena.
translations.pt: Tu iluminas a mesa para o jantar.
translations.he: אתה מאיר את השולחן לארוחת ערב.
translations.vi: Bạn thắp sáng bàn ăn cho bữa tối.
translations.nl: Je verlicht de tafel voor het diner.
translations.hi: तुम रात के खाने के लिए मेज को रोशन करते हो.
translations.el: Φωτίζεις το τραπέζι για το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Du lyser opp bordet til middag.
translations.id: Kamu menerangi meja untuk makan malam.
translations.sv: Du lyser upp bordet inför middagen.
translations.da: Du lyser bordet op til middag.
translations.ja: 夕食のためにテーブルを照らす。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb (present indicative, 2nd person singular); transitive, selecting 'la table' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determinizes 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'illumines'.
Preposition marking purpose; introduces the nominal complement 'le dîner'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determinizes 'dîner'.
Common noun, masculine; complement of the preposition 'pour' expressing intended purpose.

sentences.target: Ces guirlandes illuminent le balcon la nuit.
sentences.reading: /se giʁlɑ̃d il.y.min lə balkɔ̃ la nɥi/

translations.fr: Ces guirlandes illuminent le balcon la nuit.
translations.ipa: /se giʁlɑ̃d il.y.min lə balkɔ̃ la nɥi/
translations.en: These string lights light up the balcony at night.
translations.es: Estas guirnaldas de luces iluminan el balcón por la noche.
translations.de: Diese Lichterketten beleuchten nachts den Balkon.
translations.it: Queste luci a filo illuminano il balcone di notte.
translations.ko: 이 전구 줄은 밤에 발코니를 밝힌다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这些串灯在夜里点亮阳台。
translations.yue: 呢啲燈串喺夜晚照亮露台。
translations.pt: Essas luzes em cordão iluminam a varanda à noite.
translations.he: שרשראות האורות האלה מאירות את המרפסת בלילה.
translations.tr: Bu ışık zincirleri geceleri balkonu aydınlatıyor.
translations.vi: Những dây đèn này làm sáng ban công vào ban đêm.
translations.ar: هذه السلاسل الضوئية تضيء الشرفة ليلاً.
translations.nl: Deze lichtslingers verlichten het balkon 's nachts.
translations.hu: Ezek a fényfüzérek éjjel megvilágítják az erkélyt.
translations.hi: ये लाइटों की झालरें रात में बालकनी को रोशन करती हैं.
translations.pl: Te girlandy świetlne oświetlają balkon w nocy.
translations.el: Αυτές οι γιρλάντες φωτισμού φωτίζουν το μπαλκόνι τη νύχτα.
translations.nb: Disse lyslenkene lyser opp balkongen om natten.
translations.id: Lampu hias beruntai ini menerangi balkon pada malam hari.
translations.sv: De här ljusslingorna lyser upp balkongen på natten.
translations.ro: Aceste șiruri de lumini luminează balconul noaptea.
translations.cs: Tyto světelné řetězy osvětlují balkon v noci.
translations.da: Disse lyskæder lyser altanen op om natten.
translations.ja: このイルミネーションのライトは夜にベランダを照らす。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, plural; determinizes the subject noun 'guirlandes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; grammatical subject of 'illuminent'.
Finite lexical verb (present indicative, 3rd person plural); agrees with 'guirlandes' and takes 'le balcon' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determinizes 'balcon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'illuminent'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determinizes 'nuit' in a temporal nominal phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; functions as a temporal adjunct ('la nuit').

sentences.target: On va illuminer la cour du lycée.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va il.y.mi.ne la kuʁ dy lise/

translations.fr: On va illuminer la cour du lycée.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va il.y.mi.ne la kuʁ dy lise/
translations.en: We're going to light up the school courtyard.
translations.es: Vamos a iluminar el patio del instituto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要把学校的院子点亮。
translations.yue: 我哋會點亮學校嘅中庭。
translations.pt: Vamos iluminar o pátio da escola.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים להאיר את חצר בית הספר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ thắp sáng sân trường.
translations.hu: Meg fogjuk világítani az iskola udvarát.
translations.hi: हम स्कूल के प्रांगण को रोशन करेंगे.
translations.el: Θα φωτίσουμε την αυλή του σχολείου.
translations.ja: 私たちは学校の中庭を照らす予定だ。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal subject pronoun (colloquially 'we'); 3rd person singular agreement.
Auxiliary verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular) used in periphrastic future with an infinitive.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the auxiliary 'va' forming near future.
Definite article, feminine singular; determinizes 'cour'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'illuminer'.
Fused preposition+article ('de' + 'le'); introduces a genitival/local complement 'lycée'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'du', specifying which courtyard.
